---
name: Bug Report
about: Something is broken or showing wrong data
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear description of the issue.

## Location
- **District**: (e.g. Mandya, Mysuru, Bengaluru Urban)
- **Module / Page**: (e.g. Crop Prices, Water & Dams, Leadership)
- **URL**: (paste the full URL)

## What happened
Describe what you saw.

## What should have happened
What were you expecting?

## Device & Browser
- Device: (e.g. iPhone 14, Android phone, Desktop)
- Browser: (e.g. Chrome, Safari, Firefox)
- Screen size: (mobile / tablet / desktop)

## Screenshot
If applicable, add a screenshot.

## Additional context
Any other details that might help.
